zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Pyne III於1285年出生在英國戴文唐 多馬時，他的父親Geoffrey M. De Pyne32歲，母親unknown De Lyn27歲。他於1315年與Isabel of Bradwell在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1329年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Pyne III于1285年出生在英国戴文唐 多馬时，他的父亲Geoffrey M. De Pyne32岁，母亲unknown De Lyn27岁。他于1315年与Isabel of Bradwell在英国英格兰戴文韋斯特 唐结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1329年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Pyne III was born in 1285, in Down Thomas, Devon, England, his father, Geoffrey M. De Pyne, was 32 and his mother, unknown De Lyn, was 27. He married Isabel of Bradwell in 1315, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1329, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Pyne III est né en 1285, à Down Thomas, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey M. De Pyne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, unknown De Lyn, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabel of Bradwell en 1315, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1329, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Pyne IIIが1285年にイギリスデボンダウン ソマスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey M. De Pyneは32歳，母unknown De Lynは27歳であった。1315年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンでIsabel of Bradwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1329年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Pyne III(이)가 1285년 영국 데폰 다운 톰아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey M. De Pyne(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 unknown De Lyn(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 Isabel of Bradwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1329년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Pyne III родился в 1285 г. в местности доун томас, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey M. De Pyne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали unknown De Lyn, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel of Bradwell в 1315 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1329 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
